title: Velvety Romantic Citrus Shortcrust Pastry
description: A low-carb-friendly, citrusy and velvety dessert featuring a romantic twist with its Kenyan dish background, this shortcrust pastry is perfect for a breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Grated Zest of 1 Lime and 1 Lemon

instructions: Mix flours, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
Add cold coconut oil cubes into the flour mixture and use your fingers or a pastry blender to work until coarse crumbs form.
Gradually add eggs while mixing; keep adding cream gradually as well, until dough comes together nicely.
Gently fold in grated citrus zest.
Transfer dough onto a floured surface and knead 8-10 times gently but thoroughly to bring all ingredients fully combined.
Pat the dough into an even circle about 1/2 inch thick. Chill for at least 30 minutes before cutting desired shapes with a biscuit cutter or knife.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and puffed up slightly. Allow to cool before serving.
